name: Chicken Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 2 cans cream of chicken soup, undiluted
1/4 teaspoon curry powder, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli slightly in boiling water and spread it on the bottom of a greased 13 x 9 baking dish.
2. Stir together the chicken, soup, mayonnaise, mushrooms, curry powder, sherry, and 1/2 cup of the Parmesan cheese.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over the broccoli in the baking dish.
4. Top with the remaining 1/4 cup parmesan cheese.
5. Freeze until ready to serve.
6. When thawed, bake covered at 350°F for 40 minutes.
7. Uncover and bake an additional 20 minutes.
